testcase.name: test_register_new_then_conflict
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_healthbridge_api.py:60: in test_register_new_then_conflict assert r.status_code == 201, r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":[{"type":"value_error","loc":["body","email"],"msg":"value is not a valid email address: The part after the @-sign is a special-use or reserved name that cannot be used with email.","input":"test_cb19e809@hb.test","ctx":{"reason":"The part after the @-sign is a special-use or reserved name that cannot be used with email."}}]} E assert 422 == 201 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
